positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a fantastical forest scene viewed through a stained-glass window effect. The central subject is an ornate, bioluminescent owl perched on a gothic branch, surrounded by abstract flora and geometric ivy patterns. The palette utilizes deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with glowing, warm gold accents. The style is neo-art deco mixed with stained glass illustration, creating strong, clean silhouettes and defined lines. Composition should be perfectly centered and suitable for a circular or square textile print. Use high contrast and flat colors to ensure print clarity. Symmetry is paramount. Graphic novel quality, high detail, vector art aesthetic.
